deep.title: Harness-1: Reinforcement Learning for Search Agents with State-Externalizing Harnesses
deep.one_line: 将搜索Agent的状态管理外部化到环境，强化学习训练更高效，可迁移模式。

deep.title: KVarN: Variance-Normalized KV-Cache Quantization Mitigates Error Accumulation in Reasoning Tasks
deep.one_line: 提出KVarN，一种免校准的KV缓存量化方法，通过哈达玛变换和双尺度方差归一化减少推理时误差累积。

deep.title: LongTraceRL: Learning Long-Context Reasoning from Search Agent Trajectories with Rubric Rewards
deep.one_line: 用搜索轨迹和评分奖励训练模型进行长上下文推理。

radar.title: Audio Interaction Model
radar.one_line: 统一流式音频模型实现实时感知-决策-响应循环的在线交互。

radar.title: Code2LoRA: Hypernetwork-Generated Adapters for Code Language Models under Software Evolution
radar.one_line: 用超网络生成仓库级LoRA，零开销注入代码知识，适合持续演化的工程项目。

radar.title: Masking Stale Observations Helps Search Agents -- Until It Doesn't: A Regime Map and Its Mechanism
radar.one_line: 系统研究遮蔽陈旧观测的效果及机制，为长程搜索agent的上下文管理提供重要指导。

radar.title: Trust Region On-Policy Distillation
radar.one_line: 提出信任区域在线蒸馏方法，稳定师生分布差异下的蒸馏训练。

radar.title: GrepSeek: Training Search Agents for Direct Corpus Interaction
radar.one_line: 代理通过shell命令直接与语料库交互，替代传统检索。

radar.title: Reproducing, Analyzing, and Detecting Reward Hacking in Rubric-Based Reinforcement Learning
radar.one_line: 教了如何构建可控制奖励hacking的环境以分析和检测问题。

radar.title: On the Scaling of PEFT: Towards Million Personal Models of Trillion Parameters
radar.one_line: 通过小型适配器实现个性化模型，利用共享基础模型的缩放规律。

radar.title: Cosmos 3: Omnimodal World Models for Physical AI
radar.one_line: 统一多种模态的世界模型，同时处理理解与生成。

radar.title: VideoKR: Towards Knowledge- and Reasoning-Intensive Video Understanding
radar.one_line: 知识密集型视频理解的数据构建流程与专家标注方法，可迁移到复杂推理任务的数据管线设计。

radar.title: OCC-RAG: Optimal Cognitive Core for Faithful Question Answering
radar.one_line: 小模型加RAG实现忠实问答，展示了高效推理与知识解耦的系统设计。
